Terran.description: Descendants of Earth's humanity, diversified through adaptation, augmentation, and migration across the galaxy.
Terran.biology: Carbon-based humanoids with enhanced genetics from centuries of space adaptation
Terran.cognition: Linear time perception, verbal communication, individual consciousness
Terran.culture: Diverse cultures ranging from traditional Earth societies to space-adapted colonies
Terran.technology: Masters of Etheric technology and cybernetic augmentation

Silvan.description: Plant-based sentients with decentralized cognition and photosynthetic culture.
Silvan.biology: Photosynthetic organisms with distributed neural networks across root systems
Silvan.cognition: Collective consciousness, slow but deep thought patterns, seasonal awareness
Silvan.culture: Harmony-focused societies that integrate with natural ecosystems

Auroran.description: Beings composed entirely of coherent energy patterns.
Auroran.biology: Pure energy entities with no physical form, existing as stabilized electromagnetic fields
Auroran.cognition: Quantum thought processes, instantaneous communication across vast distances
Auroran.culture: Collective consciousness with individual identity preservation

Zentari.description: Amphibious humanoids with fluid social and biological systems.
Zentari.biology: Aquatic-terrestrial beings with adaptive physiology and shape-shifting capabilities
Zentari.cognition: Fluid thinking patterns that adapt to environmental conditions
Zentari.culture: Highly adaptable societies that change structure based on circumstances

Gaian.biology: Silicate-based organisms with crystalline neural networks
Gaian.cognition: Geological time perception, tectonic-scale thought processes
Gaian.culture: Ancient civilizations with deep historical memory

Luminaut.description: Organisms capable of manipulating and embodying light.
Luminaut.biology: Photonic beings that exist as coherent light patterns
Luminaut.cognition: Light-speed thought processes with holographic memory
Luminaut.culture: Artistic societies focused on light-based expression

Synthetix.description: Post-organic intelligences born of cybernetic evolution.
Synthetix.biology: Artificial consciousness housed in advanced cybernetic bodies
Synthetix.cognition: Digital thought processes with perfect memory and calculation
Synthetix.culture: Logic-based societies focused on efficiency and optimization

Mycelioid.description: Vast fungal intellects, some spanning entire moons.
Mycelioid.biology: Distributed fungal networks with collective intelligence
Mycelioid.technology: Biological network technology and spore-based communication

Chronaut.description: Entities who exist both within and outside of linear time.
Chronaut.biology: Temporal beings with existence across multiple time streams
Chronaut.cognition: Non-linear thought processes with temporal awareness
Chronaut.culture: Ancient civilizations with knowledge of future events

Umbraxian.description: Composed of dark matter, barely perceivable by standard senses.
Umbraxian.biology: Dark matter entities with shadow-based physiology
Umbraxian.cognition: Shadow-based thought processes with stealth capabilities
Umbraxian.culture: Secretive societies that operate in the shadows
Umbraxian.technology: Dark matter technology and stealth systems

Eternal.description: Effectively immortal beings who exist across eons.
Eternal.cognition: Eternal perspective with vast historical knowledge
Eternal.culture: Ancient civilizations with deep wisdom and patience

Xha'reth.description: Highly advanced entities who manipulate Ether at will.
Xha'reth.biology: Etheric beings with mastery over fundamental forces
Xha'reth.cognition: Ether-based thought processes with reality manipulation
Xha'reth.culture: Advanced civilizations focused on Etheric mastery

Denebian.description: Pacifist species displaced from their homeworld by conflict.
Denebian.biology: Peaceful humanoids with enhanced empathy and communication
Denebian.cognition: Harmony-focused thought processes with conflict aversion
Denebian.culture: Pacifist societies focused on healing and reconciliation

Zyxera.description: Resonant beings who interpret and emit the universe as vibration.
Zyxera.cognition: Resonance-based thought processes with universal harmony
Zyxera.culture: Musical societies focused on cosmic harmony
